betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Asteroid Mining Ship§f

§aThe most useful satellite — periodically returns with valuable asteroid materials!§f

§bThe Asteroid Mining Ship§f is a satellite rocket that periodically (~10 minutes) returns from space and deploys cargo on your cargo landing pad. Requires a §bCargo Landing Pad§f with a matching §bSatellite ID-Chip§f.

§6Warning§f: If the ship crashes into something during landing, or the cargo pad's ID-chip is changed, it will §eexplode§f and the satellite will be lost!

§6Crafting§f (§bAssembly Machine§f):
§b• 24×§f Saturnite Plate
§b• 2×§f Desh Motor
§b• 2×§f Titanium Drill
§b• 1×§f Military Grade Circuit Board
§b• 1×§f Fluid Barrel: Kerosene
§b• 1×§f Small Thruster
§b• 12×§f Photovoltaic Panel
§b• 4×§f Centrifuge Element
§b• 1×§f Lithium-Ion Battery

§6Cargo (powder form unless specified)§f:
§bVery Common§f: Coal, Redstone, Fluorite, Aluminium, Copper, Phosphorus Crystals
§bCommon§f: Iron, Lapis, Diamond, Lead, Thorium, Aluminium Crystals
§bUncommon§f: Titanium, Desh Blend, Uranium, Plutonium, Energy Powder, Nitanium Blend, Tungsten Crystals, Gold Crystals
§bRare§f: Lithium Crystals, Diamond Gravel, Uranium Crystals, Plutonium Crystals
§bVery Rare§f: Trixite Crystals, Starmetal Crystals

§eTip§f: This is the best way to obtain starmetal, trixite, and other rare space materials. Build the cargo landing pad first, set the same frequency on the ID-chip, and ensure a clear landing zone!
